column2:
observe(v.) 觀察、遵守
observation(n.) 觀察；observance(n.) 遵守
observer(n.) 觀察員
keenly observe 敏銳地觀察
observe the rules 遵守規則
Scientists observe the behavior of animals in the wild.
(科學家在野外觀察動物的行為)
We must observe the traffic laws to stay safe.
(我們必須遵守交通規則以保持安全)

occasion(n.) 場合、重大活動
occasional(adj.) 偶爾的；occasionally(adv.) 偶爾地
on special occasions 在特殊場合
a rare occasion 罕見的機會
I only wear a tie on special occasions.
(我只在特殊場合繫領帶)
We met on several occasions to discuss the plan.
(我們見面了好幾次來討論這個計劃)

odd(adj.) 奇怪的、奇數的
odds(n.) 勝算、可能性
odd numbers 奇數
it is odd that... ...很奇怪
He has some odd habits that I can't understand.
(他有一些我無法理解的怪習慣)
It's odd that he didn't call me yesterday.
(很奇怪，他昨天竟然沒打電話給我)

omit(v.) 省略、遺漏
omission(n.) 省略、遺漏物
omit a detail 省略細節
be omitted from 被從...中省略
Please don't omit any important information.
(請不要遺漏任何重要信息)
His name was omitted from the guest list.
(他的名字從賓客名單中被漏掉了)

ongoing(adj.) 進行中的、持續的
an ongoing process 進行中的過程
ongoing efforts 持續的努力
There is an ongoing investigation into the accident.
(針對該事故的調查正在進行中)
The project requires ongoing maintenance and support.
(該項目需要持續的維護和支持)

onion(n.) 洋蔥
chop onions 切洋蔥
raw onions 生洋蔥
She is chopping onions for the salad.
(她正在為沙拉切洋蔥)
I don't like the taste of raw onions.
(我不喜歡生洋蔥的味道)

operation(n.) 手術、運作
operate(v.) 操作、動手術；operator(n.) 操作員
come into operation 開始生效
undergo an operation 接受手術
The machine is now in full operation.
(機器現在正全力運作中)
He had a minor operation on his knee.
(他的膝蓋動了一個小手術)

opportunity(n.) 機會
a rare opportunity 難得的機會
grab an opportunity 抓住機會
Don't miss the opportunity to study abroad.
(不要錯過出國留學的機會)
He had the opportunity to meet the president.
(他有機會見到總統)

opposite(adj./n./prep./adv.) 相反的、對面
the exact opposite 完全相反
be opposite to 與...相反
They have completely opposite opinions on the matter.
(他們對這件事的看法完全相反)
The bank is just opposite the supermarket.
(銀行就在超市的正對面)

optimistic(adj.) 樂觀的
optimism(n.) 樂觀主義；optimist(n.) 樂觀的人
be optimistic about 對...感到樂觀
remain optimistic 保持樂觀
She is optimistic about her chances of winning.
(她對自己獲勝的機會感到樂觀)
We should remain optimistic despite the challenges.
(儘管面臨挑戰，我們仍應保持樂觀)

oral(adj./n.) 口頭的、口試
orally(adv.) 口頭地
an oral exam 口試
oral hygiene 口腔衛生
Students have to take an oral test next week.
(學生們下週必須參加口試)
Good oral hygiene is important for your health.
(良好的口腔衛生對你的健康很重要)

organic(adj.) 有機的、器官的
organically(adv.) 有機地
organic food 有機食物
organic farming 有機耕作
More and more people prefer to buy organic vegetables.
(越來越多的人更喜歡購買有機蔬菜)
Organic farming is better for the environment.
(有機耕作對環境更好)

organize(v.) 組織、安排
organization(n.) 組織；organizer(n.) 組織者
organize a meeting 組織會議
well organized 組織良好的
She helped organize the school event.
(她幫忙籌劃學校活動)
The files are organized in alphabetical order.
(文件按字母順序排列)

original(adj./n.) 最初的、原件
originally(adv.) 起初；originality(n.) 創意
original copy 原件
original idea 最初的想法
This is the original version of the book.
(這是該書的最初版本)
The original painting is kept in the museum.
(原畫保存在博物館裡)

outdoor(adj.) 戶外的
outdoors(adv.) 在戶外
outdoor activities 戶外活動
outdoor concert 戶外音樂會
He enjoys outdoor activities like hiking and cycling.
(他喜歡健行和騎自行車等戶外活動)
We are planning an outdoor party this weekend.
(我們計劃本週末舉辦一場戶外派對)

outdoors(adv.) 在戶外
play outdoors 在戶外玩耍
sleep outdoors 在戶外睡覺
Children should spend more time playing outdoors.
(孩子們應該花更多時間在戶外玩耍)
It's a beautiful day; let's go outdoors.
(天氣很好，我們去戶外吧)

outer(adj.) 外部的、外層的
outer space 外太空
outer shell 外殼
The rocket was launched into outer space.
(火箭被發射到外太空)
He wore an outer layer of warm clothing.
(他穿了一層保暖的外衣)

outline(n./v.) 大綱、輪廓、概述
a brief outline 簡短的大綱
outline a plan 概述計劃
She wrote a brief outline of her speech.
(她寫了一份演講的簡短大綱)
The mountain was clearly outlined against the sky.
(天空映襯出山的清晰輪廓)

oven(n.) 烤箱
preheat the oven 預熱烤箱
bake in the oven 在烤箱中烘烤
Place the cake in the preheated oven.
(將蛋糕放入預熱好的烤箱中)
Be careful, the oven is still very hot.
(小心，烤箱還是很燙)

overseas(adv./adj.) 在海外、海外的
study overseas 在國外學習
overseas students 海外學生
Many students dream of studying overseas.
(許多學生夢想出國留學)
The company is expanding its overseas market.
(公司正在擴大其海外市場)

owe(v.) 欠債、歸功於
owe someone money 欠某人錢
owe success to... 將成功歸功於...
I owe him ten dollars for lunch.
(我欠他十美元的午餐費)
He owes his success to hard work and luck.
(他將自己的成功歸功於努力和運氣)

owl(n.) 貓頭鷹
a night owl 熬夜的人
hoot like an owl 像貓頭鷹一樣鳴叫
Owls are birds that hunt at night.
(貓頭鷹是夜間捕食的鳥類)
I am a night owl and prefer to work late.
(我是個熬夜的人，喜歡工作到很晚)

ownership(n.) 所有權
owner(n.) 所有人；own(v./adj.) 擁有/自己的
private ownership 私有制
transfer of ownership 所有權轉移
The house is under private ownership.
(這棟房子是私有的)
The company is debating its ownership structure.
(公司正在討論其所有權結構)

ox(n.) 公牛
strong as an ox 強壯如牛
a team of oxen 一隊公牛
The farmer used oxen to plow the field.
(農民用公牛來犁地)
He is as strong as an ox.
(他像牛一樣強壯)

pad(n./v.) 墊子、護具、填補
knee pads 護膝
a notepad 筆記本
You should wear knee pads when skating.
(溜冰時你應該戴護膝)
He wrote the number down on a notepad.
(他把號碼寫在筆記本上)

painter(n.) 畫家、油漆工
paint(v./n.) 繪畫/油漆；painting(n.) 畫作
a famous painter 著名的畫家
a house painter 油漆匠
Picasso was a very famous painter.
(畢卡索是一位非常著名的畫家)
The painter is painting the walls white.
(油漆工正在把牆漆成白色)

pal(n.) 好朋友、夥伴
pen pal 筆友
best pal 最好的朋友
We have been pals since primary school.
(我們從小學起就是好朋友了)
I still write letters to my pen pal in London.
(我仍寫信給我在倫敦的筆友)

palace(n.) 宮殿
royal palace 皇宮
Buckingham Palace 白金漢宮
The queen lives in the royal palace.
(女王住在皇宮裡)
Thousands of tourists visit the palace every year.
(每年有成千上萬的遊客參觀這座宮殿)

palm(n.) 手掌、棕櫚樹
palm tree 棕櫚樹
read someone's palm 看手相
He held the tiny bird in his palm.
(他把那隻小鳥捧在手心裡)
The beach was lined with tall palm trees.
(海灘上排滿了高大的棕櫚樹)

pancake(n.) 煎餅、薄餅
make pancakes 做煎餅
a stack of pancakes 一疊煎餅
We had pancakes with maple syrup for breakfast.
(我們早餐吃了配楓糖漿的煎餅)
She is flipping pancakes in the pan.
(她正在平底鍋裡翻煎餅)

panic(n./v.) 恐慌
spread panic 散播恐慌
panic buying 恐慌性購買
The loud noise caused a sudden panic in the crowd.
(巨大的噪音引起了群眾的突然恐慌)
Don't panic; everything will be fine.
(別驚慌，一切都會好起來的)

parade(n./v.) 遊行
a victory parade 勝利遊行
march in a parade 參加遊行遊街
There will be a grand parade on National Day.
(國慶節將有盛大的遊行)
Thousands of people lined the streets for the parade.
(成千上萬的人站在街道兩旁觀看遊行)

paradise(n.) 天堂、樂園
a tropical paradise 熱帶天堂
a shopper's paradise 購物者的天堂
This beautiful island is a tropical paradise.
(這座美麗的小島是個熱帶天堂)
To him, the quiet library was paradise.
(對他來說，安靜的圖書館就是天堂)

parcel(n./v.) 包裹、郵包
send a parcel 寄包裹
deliver a parcel 送包裹
The postman delivered a heavy parcel this morning.
(郵差今天早上送來了一個沉重的包裹)
I need to go to the post office to send this parcel.
(我需要去郵局寄這個包裹)

parrot(n./v.) 鸚鵡、機械地模仿
a colorful parrot 色彩鮮豔的鸚鵡
parrot someone's words 鸚鵡學舌
The parrot can mimic human speech.
(這隻鸚鵡會模仿人類說話)
Don't just parrot what the teacher says.
(不要只是機械地模仿老師說的話)

passage(n.) 通道、(文章)段落
a narrow passage 狹窄的通道
a reading passage 閱讀段落
He walked through a narrow passage between the buildings.
(他走過建築物之間一條狹窄的通道)
Please read the following passage carefully.
(請仔細閱讀以下段落)

passenger(n.) 乘客
passenger train 客運火車
bus passenger 公車乘客
The bus was full of passengers this morning.
(今天早上公車擠滿了乘客)
All passengers must wear seat belts.
(所有乘客都必須繫好安全帶)

passion(n.) 熱情、愛好
passionate(adj.) 熱情的
have a passion for... 對...有熱情
with passion 熱情地
Music is her greatest passion in life.
(音樂是她生命中最大的熱忱)
He spoke about the project with great passion.
(他充滿激情地談論這個項目)

passport(n.) 護照
a valid passport 有效護照
renew a passport 更新護照
You must show your passport at the border.
(你必須在邊境出示護照)
I need to renew my passport before I go abroad.
(我出國前需要更新護照)

pat(v./n.) 拍、輕拍
a pat on the back 讚揚/輕拍背部
pat someone on the shoulder 拍某人的肩膀
She gave the dog a friendly pat on the head.
(她友善地拍了拍狗的頭)
He got a pat on the back for his good work.
(他因為工作表現出色而受到稱讚)

patience(n.) 耐心
patient(adj./n.) 有耐心的/病人
lose patience 失去耐心
have no patience for... 對...沒有耐心
Teaching children requires a lot of patience.
(教孩子需要很大的耐心)
I am starting to lose my patience with him.
(我開始對他失去耐心了)

pause(n./v.) 暫停、停頓
a long pause 長時間的停頓
pause for a moment 稍作停頓
There was a long pause before she answered.
(她回答前停頓了很久)
He paused for a moment to catch his breath.
(他停了一會兒來喘口氣)

pave(v.) 鋪(路)；pavement(n.) 人行道
pave the way for... 為...鋪平道路
walk on the pavement 走在人行道上
This discovery paved the way for new treatments.
(這項發現為新的治療方法鋪平了道路)
In the city, you should walk on the pavement.
(在城市裡，你應該走在人行道上)

pea(n.) 豌豆
green peas 綠豌豆
as like as two peas 一模一樣
We had roast chicken with green peas.
(我們吃了烤雞配綠豌豆)
The two brothers are as like as two peas.
(這兄弟倆長得一模一樣)

peanut(n.) 花生
peanut butter 花生醬
be allergic to peanuts 對花生過敏
I love spreading peanut butter on my toast.
(我喜歡在吐司上塗花生醬)
She can't eat this because she is allergic to peanuts.
(她不能吃這個，因為她對花生過敏)

pearl(n.) 珍珠
a pearl necklace 珍珠項鍊
a pearl of wisdom 智慧的結晶
She was wearing a beautiful pearl necklace.
(她戴著一條美麗的珍珠項鍊)
He shared a pearl of wisdom with the graduates.
(他與畢業生們分享了一句智慧名言)

peel(v./n.) 剝皮、(蔬果)外皮
peeler(n.) 削皮器
peel an apple 削蘋果
orange peel 橘子皮
Could you help me peel the potatoes?
(你能幫我給土豆削皮嗎？)
He slipped on a banana peel.
(他踩到香蕉皮滑倒了)

penguin(n.) 企鵝
a colony of penguins 企鵝群
Emperor Penguin 帝企鵝
Penguins are flightless birds that live in cold areas.
(企鵝是生活在寒冷地區的不會飛的鳥類)
We saw many penguins at the zoo.
(我們在動物園看到了很多企鵝)

penny(n.) (美、英)分、一分錢
penniless(adj.) 身無分文的
every penny 每一分錢
He saved every penny to buy a new car.
(他省下每一分錢來買新車)
It won't cost you a single penny.
(這不會花你一分錢)

pepper(n.) 胡椒、甜椒
black pepper 黑胡椒
red peppers 紅椒
Add some salt and pepper to the soup.
(給湯裡加點鹽和胡椒)
She is cutting up some red peppers for the stir-fry.
(她正在切紅椒準備炒菜)

perform(v.) 表演、執行
performance(n.) 表演、表現；performer(n.) 表演者
perform a task 執行任務
perform on stage 在舞台上表演
The choir will perform several songs tonight.
(合唱團今晚將演唱幾首歌)
Surgeons perform hundreds of operations here.
(外科醫生在這裡進行數百次手術)

performance(n.) 表演、表現
performer(n.) 表演者
a live performance 現場表演
academic performance 學業表現
The actors gave a wonderful performance.
(演員們進行了一場精彩的表演)
His academic performance has improved a lot.
(他的學業表現進步了很多)

permission(n.) 許可、准許
permit(v./n.) 准許/許可證
ask for permission 請求許可
without permission 未經許可
You must ask for permission before leaving the room.
(離開房間前必須請求許可)
He took the car without his father's permission.
(他未經父親准許就開走了車)

permit(v./n.) 允許、許可證
permission(n.) 許可
a parking permit 停車許可證
weather permitting 天氣允許的話
We will go for a picnic, weather permitting.
(如果天氣允許，我們將去野餐)
Smoking is not permitted in this building.
(這棟大樓內不准吸菸)

persuade(v.) 說服
persuasion(n.) 說服；persuasive(adj.) 有說服力的
persuade someone to do something 說服某人做某事
try to persuade 試圖說服
I tried to persuade him to stop smoking.
(我試圖說服他戒菸)
She finally persuaded her parents to let her travel.
(她最終說服父母讓她去旅行)

photographer(n.) 攝影師
photograph(n./v.) 照片/攝影；photography(n.) 攝影術
a professional photographer 專業攝影師
an amateur photographer 業餘攝影師
The photographer took many pictures at the wedding.
(攝影師在婚禮上拍了很多照片)
She wants to become a famous wildlife photographer.
(她想成為一名著名的野生動物攝影師)

pigeon(n.) 鴿子
a carrier pigeon 信鴿
feed the pigeons 餵鴿子
There are many pigeons in the city square.
(城市廣場上有很多鴿子)
Carrier pigeons were used to send messages.
(信鴿曾被用來傳遞信息)

pile(n./v.) 堆、堆積
a pile of books 一疊書
pile up 堆積起來
There was a pile of dirty dishes in the sink.
(洗碗槽裡有一堆髒盤子)
Work started to pile up on his desk.
(工作開始在他桌上堆積起來)

pill(n.) 藥丸
take a pill 吃藥
sleeping pill 安眠藥
The doctor told him to take one pill three times a day.
(醫生叫他一天吃三次藥，每次一顆)
She had to take a sleeping pill to help her rest.
(她不得不吃安眠藥來幫助休息)

pilot(n./v.) 飛行員、駕駛(飛機)
a fighter pilot 戰鬥機飛行員
pilot a plane 駕駛飛機
The pilot announced that we would land soon.
(飛行員宣佈我們很快就要降落了)
He was trained to pilot large passenger planes.
(他接受過駕駛大型客機的訓練)

pine(n.) 松樹
pine tree 松樹
pine forest 松樹林
The air was filled with the scent of pine.
(空氣中充滿了松樹的香味)
We walked through a thick pine forest.
(我們穿過了一片茂密的松樹林)

pineapple(n.) 鳳梨
pineapple juice 鳳梨汁
a slice of pineapple 一片鳳梨
Would you like some fresh pineapple for dessert?
(你想吃點新鮮鳳梨當甜點嗎？)
I prefer drinking pineapple juice to orange juice.
(比起橘子汁，我更喜歡喝鳳梨汁)

pint(n.) 品脫(容量單位)
a pint of milk 一品脫牛奶
a pint of beer 一品脫啤酒
He drank a pint of water after the race.
(比賽結束後他喝了一品脫的水)
Could you buy a pint of milk on your way home?
(你回家的路上能買一品脫牛奶嗎？)

pit(n.) 坑洞、果核
a deep pit 深坑
peach pit 桃核
The workers dug a deep pit in the ground.
(工人們在地上挖了一個深坑)
Be careful not to swallow the cherry pit.
(小心不要吞下櫻桃核)

pitch(n./v.) 音高、投球、搭帳篷
a football pitch 足球場
pitch a tent 搭帳篷
The singer has perfect pitch.
(這位歌手有絕對音準)
We found a flat area to pitch our tent.
(我們找到一塊平坦的地方搭帳篷)

pity(n./v.) 同情、遺憾
pitiful(adj.) 可憐的
what a pity! 真可惜！
take pity on someone 同情某人
It's a pity that you can't come to the party.
(真可惜你不能來參加派對)
I took pity on the homeless dog and fed it.
(我同情那隻流浪狗並餵了它)

plastic(n./adj.) 塑膠(的)
plastic bag 塑膠袋
plastic surgery 整形手術
We should reduce the use of plastic bags.
(我們應該減少塑膠袋的使用)
This toy is made of cheap plastic.
(這個玩具是用廉價塑膠製成的)

playful(adj.) 愛玩的、嬉戲的
playfully(adv.) 嬉戲地
a playful puppy 愛玩的小狗
in a playful mood 處於愛玩的狀態
The playful puppy kept jumping on me.
(那隻愛玩的小狗一直往我身上跳)
He gave her a playful nudge on the arm.
(他嬉皮笑臉地推了一下她的手臂)

plenty(pron./n./adv.) 豐富、充足
plenty of... 許多...
plenty more 還有很多
Don't worry, we have plenty of time.
(別擔心，我們有充足的時間)
There are plenty of vegetables in the garden.
